gpt55_review_summary: Gibbs the 3rd approved the final patch, including the purpose-sidecar validator/docs/tests and pr-evidence/require-databricks-purpose-sidecars files.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Required Databricks run-status submit_payload task summaries to carry non-empty purpose tags.
Documented the purpose-tag requirement in the release-bundle README contract.
why: Strict V1 release bundles use Databricks task purpose tags to prove coverage for benchmark, storage-reader, and native engine-probe runs, so release sidecars should fail closed when those tags are absent.
